label: plain_text
text:
See the rectangle in Fig. 8.4 and the name
given to it: ABCD. This
e can also be named in other Ways—BCDA, CDAB, DABC,
rectangle
and BADc. So, can a rectangle be named using
ADCB, DCBA, CBAD a
any combination of the labels around its corners? No! For example,
it cannot be named ABDC or ACBD. Can you see what names are
allowed and what names are not?
